items.title: Salesforce AI Push Links Telecom Tools And Formula 1 To Valuation Gap
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) has rolled out Agentforce for Communications, bringing telecom focused AI tools to customer service and network operations. The company also launched an AI powered Fan Companion Agent with Formula 1, extending their partnership into real time fan engagement. New integrations, including m3ter’s advanced metering for Salesforce Revenue Cloud and AI driven document processing apps, are expanding usage based and AI centered monetization options. Salesforce enters this AI...

items.title: Dow Jones Movers: IBM Leads, Sherwin-Williams Drags as Analysts Clash on Salesforce
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (NYSE: DIA) had a rough week, falling 2.95% as tariff anxiety, macro uncertainty, and a VIX spike to 23.75 rattled blue-chip investors. That fear gauge is now sitting at its 88th percentile over the past year, we’ll see if that continues as much of this week’s sell-off came from worries the ... Dow Jones Movers: IBM Leads, Sherwin-Williams Drags as Analysts Clash on Salesforce

items.title: Marc Benioff Said Mass AI Layoffs Weren't Coming. Then Came A Brutal Week For White-Collar Jobs.
items.description: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff downplayed fears of AI causing mass layoffs, but Morgan Stanley, Oracle, Capital One made headlines on job cuts during the same week. A comment that didn't age well?

items.title: 3 Things That Make You Delusional About BDCs
